channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I swear by Bose headphones — and these 4 best-rated models are all on sale for Memorial Day with up to $120 off
item.description: I've used Bose headphones for almost a decade and they remain some of the best cans I've ever used, so here's why you shouldn't miss your chance to save up to $120 on these top-rated cans at Amazon for Memorial Day.

item.title: Une sonde de la Nasa vient de frôler Mars, et les images rapportées donnent envie de zoomer partout
item.description: La sonde Psyché de la Nasa rebondit de planète en planète avec pour objectif de visiter d'ici 2029 un astéroïde mystérieux qui pourrait avoir été couvert de volcans de fer dans un lointain passé. Elle a survolé Mars sur son trajet et, en s'en approchant, ses instruments ont pris des images...

item.title: OpenAI may go public as soon as September
item.description: OpenAI's potential IPO would come after a jury sided with CEO Sam Altman in a legal battle with Elon Musk.

item.title: Enterprise AI agents keep failing because they forget what they learned
item.description: RAG architectures are good at one thing: surfacing semantically relevant documents. That's also where they stop.A framework called a decision context graph addresses that gap by giving agents structured memory, time-aware reasoning, and explicit decision logic. Rippletide, a startup in the Neo4j ecosystem, has built one. The key capability: agents that are non-regressive, able to freeze validated sequences of actions and compound on them over time.“The key point you want is non-regressivity: How do you make sure that, when the agent will generate something new, you can compound on the previous...

item.title: Xreal's Project Aura smartglasses are a maximalist take on Android XR
item.description: At Google I/O 2026, we took a closer look at Xreal's Project Aura, one of the first Android XR smart glasses.

item.title: Tesla’s Full Self-Driving software is creeping into Europe
item.description: First came the Netherlands, now it's Lithuania. And more European countries appear to be in the queue for Tesla's driver assistance system.

item.title: Test du RockMow Z1 : Roborock débarque dans le jardin avec un robot tondeuse AWD qui ne fait pas semblant
item.description: Pentes irrégulières, passages étroits et deux chiens dans les pattes : voici ce que vaut vraiment le RockMow Z150 après deux semaines de test en conditions réelles.

item.title: Google Gemini partout dans votre smartphone et les ordinateurs Googlebook : tout savoir en vidéo
item.description: Google a annoncé une profonde évolution de son écosystème avec l'intégration de Google Gemini dans vos appareils et le lancement des ordinateurs Googlebook. Autant de nouveautés à découvrir dans notre vidéo.

item.title: I’ve tested the latest Switch 2 controllers, and this one is the best
item.description: If you choose to get an extra controller for your Nintendo Switch 2, you can spend a lot — and get a lot in return. Buying Nintendo’s own $89 Switch 2 Pro Controller, for instance, will net you the console’s only wireless controller with a 3.5mm headphone jack for private listening, not to mention great-feeling […]

item.title: Airbnb gets into hotels, expands AI for host onboarding and customer support
item.description: Airbnb will soon let you book luggage storage and car rental services on its app

item.title: Microsoft warns hackers are exploiting password resets to gain access to user accounts - here's how to stay safe
item.description: Storm-2949 is engaged in a "methodical, sophisticated, and multi-layered" campaign against Microsoft 365 accounts.

item.title: I Gave My OpenClaw Agent a Physical Body
item.description: The coding skills of AI models are about to make it much easier to build and deploy robots.

item.title: How Wet Weather in Argentina Helped Fuel the Cruise Ship Hantavirus Outbreak
item.description: Climate change is helping create conditions that are driving the rodent boom—dubbed a ratada—in Argentina.

item.title: Plex triples the cost of its lifetime pass
item.description: Plex's Lifetime Pass subscription is getting one of the most exorbitant price increases we've seen in a while in the near future.

item.title: Everything announced at Google I/O 2026 in 13 minutes
item.description: Google I/O 2026 focused heavily on Gemini AI, Android XR, and smarter personalized experiences across devices.

item.title: Anthropic and OpenAI take their beef to the midterm elections
item.description: Hello and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge subscribers about the car crashes piling up on a daily basis at the Washington-based intersection of technology and politics. If you're not a subscriber, sign up for our fine editorial enterprise today, especially as we process the end of Musk v. Altman. And if you have […]

item.title: Google I/O 2026: The good, the bad, and the mind-blowing
item.description: Experts break down the biggest announcements from Google I/O 2026, including Gemini and Android XR glasses.

item.title: Vibe coding is coming to your phone
item.description: "There's an app for that" was the promise of the App Store from the very beginning. The app that will get your phone to do the thing you want it to? It's just a few taps away. The tagline wasn't strictly true - I'm still waiting for that one perfect grocery list app. Still, apps […]

item.title: Global EV market goes K-shaped as the U.S. gets left behind
item.description: EV sales have surged worldwide in every region but the U.S., posing risks for legacy and startup automakers.

item.title: Xiaomi Poco Pad C1 : la mini-tablette 9,7 pouces à 120 Hz arrive à l’international
item.description: Xiaomi pousse discrètement à l'international une nouvelle Poco Pad C1, petite tablette de 9,7 pouces à 120 Hz pensée pour viser bas en prix. La fiche produit est en ligne, mais ni date ni tarif officiels.

item.title: Volvo is trying to put its EV stumbles in the rearview
item.description: Volvo once had ambitions to fully exit the gas car business. Now it's trying to keep its tenuous foothold in the EV market. It's not an understatement to say that Volvo's EV journey has been a bumpy one. The compact EX40 has been a consistent winner, but the Swedish brand's other EVs have been plagued […]

item.title: 81 major housing markets where home prices are falling
item.description: After a burst of softening, the count of major metros seeing year-over-year home price declines has stabilized over the past ten months. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.
